title: Children's Naughty or Nice Reward Chart & 40 Stickers - Christmas Sticker Countdown Sticker Chart Good & Bad Behaviour 1384
features: Christmas Santa's Naughty or Nice Reward Chart with Stickers
The Christmas Santa's Naughty or Nice Reward Chart is an engaging and festive tool designed to enhance the excitement of the holiday season for children while encouraging positive behaviour.
Crafted from high-quality paper, this reward chart features ample space to track progress over 24 days, making it an ideal companion for advent calendars as families count down to Christmas Day.
Included with the chart are 20 Naughty Elf Stickers and 20 Nice Santa Stickers, allowing parents to reward their children's good behaviour or playfully acknowledge their mischievous moments.

Measuring approximately 35cm x 25cm, this vibrant and colourful chart not only serves as a motivational tool but also adds a delightful touch to holiday decorations, ensuring that children remain enthusiastic and mindful of their actions throughout the festive season.
